prompt: A pixel art representation of a bustling space station interior, with colorful aliens and human astronauts mingling.
prompt_refined: A vibrant, bustling pixel art interior of a futuristic space station. Colorful aliens of various species and human astronauts are prominently featured, actively mingling throughout the scene. In the foreground, a human astronaut is seen conversing with a tall, multi-limbed alien near a glowing console. To their right, a small group of different alien species and humans are gathered around a holographic display. The midground depicts a dense, active crowd moving along curved walkways and interacting near various stalls. In the background, a large panoramic window on the left offers a view of a distant planet and asteroid field, while on the right, towering futuristic structures define the station's architecture.
objects: Human astronaut conversing with a tall, multi-limbed alien (in foreground)
Group of aliens and humans around a holographic display (in foreground, to their right)
Dense, active crowd on curved walkways and interacting near stalls (in midground)
Large panoramic window on the left with view of a distant planet and asteroid field (in background)
Towering futuristic structures on the right (in background)
